feature_flag.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API
feature_flag.false_behavior: Parcel Discovery continues to use public/intelligence/parcel-search-index.json and local static filtering.
feature_flag.true_behavior: Blank-query structured parcel filters call the FastAPI GET /parcels/filter endpoint. Text searches of three or more characters continue to use GET /parcels/search.
feature_flag.fallback_behavior: If the backend filter request fails, times out, or returns an invalid shape, Parcel Discovery falls back to the generated static parcel search index and shows a non-blocking fallback status.

ui_fields_preserved: owner_display via static enrichment when available
mailing city/state via static enrichment when available

static_fallback.notes: Static filtering remains the default when NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API is false and the fallback when the filter API is unavailable.

build.note: The first build attempt reached the command timeout; rerun with a wider timeout completed successfully.

validation.browser_smoke_note: The Browser plugin tools were not exposed in this session, so smoke checks were performed through local HTTP/API calls and static artifact validation.

remaining_static_dependencies: public/intelligence/parcel-search-index.json remains the default and fallback search/filter source.
Owner and mailing context for filter endpoint rows are preserved by merging with the static index when matching parcel IDs are available.
Map selection, parcel geometry focus, and SceneView interactions remain disconnected from backend parcel filtering.
